title: Market Understanding
text: I just finished reading your pitch deck... I must say your team understood the market very well.
name: Obomhense Idemudia JED

title: Great transport idea
text: Good transport idea you have 👍🏻. Its a tough time for starting a business given the economy & structure of transport unions, I wish you good luck 🤞🏻.
name: Survey Respondent

title: Applause and Advice
text: This is good, this is real good... Instead of doing it elaborately, If you know the barest minimum(financially) it would take to  kick off, get it, kick off, then try to administer improvements based on criticisms you get or what you have in mind.
name: Godwin Samuel
